title: botrypus cicutaria
intro: Botrypus cicutaria, also known as butterbur, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the lily family. Traditionally, butterbur has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which help to alleviate symptoms such as migraines and other types of headaches. The health benefits of butterbur also include its potential to reduce allergic reactions and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for allergies and colds. Butterbur is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also available in topical creams and ointments for skin issues such as eczema and acne.
